description_long: This is a single-story hardware store building with a flat roof featuring four square rooftop structures, likely HVAC units or skylights. The exterior walls are tan with red trim, and the front facade includes a double-door entrance flanked by large windows. The building is set on a paved lot with marked parking spaces, including a designated accessible spot near the entrance. The windows are symmetrically placed on the side walls, and the roof has a slight overhang above the entrance. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A tan, single-story hardware store with red trim, flat roof, and a parking lot with marked spaces and a main entrance with large windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing tan walls with red trim, three windows, and a large parking lot with marked spaces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the double-door entrance, large front windows, and the main walkway leading from the parking lot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three windows and a clear view of the accessible parking space near the entrance.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat roof with four square rooftop structures and no visible windows or doors.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a central double-door entrance with large windows on either side, set back from a paved parking lot with a walkway leading directly to the doors. The exterior is simple, with symmetrical window placement and minimal decorative elements.
